meta.title: MADMall — Where Healing Meets Community
meta.description: A virtual luxury outdoor mall and teaching clinic for Black women living with Graves' disease. Community, cultural safety, and wellness — governed by constitutional principles that put you first.

cases.title: Built With Purpose, Governed With Care

features.title: Your Mall, Your Way
features.description: Every feature is designed for you — not adapted for you. Built from the ground up with the understanding that wellness is not one-size-fits-all.

items.title: Sisterhood Lounge
items.description: Real-time community spaces where you can connect with other women who understand your journey. No explaining. No justifying. Just being.

items.title: The Data Store
items.description: An Apple Store-like experience where you can browse, try on, and take home your health data insights. Your data, made beautiful and useful.

items.title: Live Experiences
items.description: Wellness workshops, creative sessions, and community events designed around the realities of living with Graves' disease.

items.title: Service Directory
items.description: Find providers who understand Graves' disease and Black women's health. Verified, reviewed, and trusted by the community.

stats.title: The Reality We're Addressing
stats.description: Graves' disease affects Black women at disproportionate rates, yet the healthcare system was not designed with us in mind. MADMall exists because the system should have been designed for us in the first place.

items.title: Black women affected by thyroid disease

Safety by design
items.description: Every feature in MADMall is governed by a Living Constitution — 5 Articles that ensure your safety, dignity, and truth are never compromised.

items.title: Build it and they will come
items.description: Once people see what's possible — a space designed with luxury, warmth, and cultural resonance — the whole world will get behind it.

items.title: Seeing is believing
items.description: For something this novel, people need to see themselves in it. The aesthetic beauty draws you in. The mission keeps you here.

items.title: Nothing about us without us
items.description: Black women with Graves' disease will be trained to run this platform at every level — design, governance, and management.

faq.title: Understanding MADMall
faq.description: MADMall is a novel concept — a virtual luxury outdoor mall and teaching clinic. Here's what you need to know.
faq.cta: Have questions? We'd love to hear from you

items.question: What is MADMall?
items.answer: MADMall is a virtual luxury outdoor mall and teaching clinic for Black women living with Graves' disease. It provides community, cultural safety, and wellness support — not medical advice. Think of it as a beautiful online space where wellness meets sisterhood.

items.question: Is MADMall a medical platform?
items.answer: No. MADMall is explicitly non-clinical. We do not diagnose, treat, or prescribe. We provide community, connection, wellness resources, and a service directory — but we are not a replacement for medical care. This boundary is a constitutional constraint enforced at every level.

items.question: What is the Data Store?
items.answer: The Data Store is like an Apple Store for your health data. You can browse data insights, 'try them on' to see what's relevant to you, and take home what helps. The goal is to make your data personal, beautiful, and useful — so you feel ownership of your own health journey.

items.question: What does 'governed by a Living Constitution' mean?
items.answer: Every feature in MADMall operates under The Living Constitution — a formal governance document with 5 Articles covering your rights (safety, accessibility, dignity, clarity, truth), how code is written, why features exist, who has authority, and how the system learns from mistakes. It's real governance, not marketing.

items.question: How can I get involved?
items.answer: MADMall is being built in public. We're training Black women with Graves' disease to participate at every level — from design to governance to management. Follow our journey, join the community when we launch, or reach out to learn about co-creation opportunities.

cta.title: A Space Designed for Us, By Us
cta.description: MADMall is being built with the community it serves. Every decision is governed by constitutional principles that ensure your safety, dignity, and voice are never an afterthought. This is what it looks like when the system is designed for you from the start.

meta.title: Connect With MADMall
meta.description: Whether you're a Black woman with Graves' disease, a potential collaborator, or someone who believes in this mission — we want to hear from you.

benefits.title: Co-Creation Opportunities

benefits.title: Constitutional Governance
benefits.description: Every interaction with MADMall is governed by our Living Constitution — your safety and dignity are non-negotiable.
